name: KNX
description: High-level KNX coordinator (class KNX in KnxCoordinator.h): owns an injected IKnxDriver, sends KnxValues via KnxFrame, and dispatches incoming telegrams to an intrusive IKnxReceiver registry. Core is Arduino-free and host-testable. The public one-line facade KNX.h lives in KNX_Object (top of the DAG); this module holds only the class so objects can depend on it without a cycle.
